scenario.headline: Italian Grand Prix puts real weight on 2026 energy release and active-aero transitions across the lap sequence.
scenario.strategy_outlook: Deployment management and low-drag efficiency are a bigger part of the race than usual, especially in traffic.
scenario.event_outlook: Safety car is the strongest race-control channel, with a lap-model volatility index of 0.30.
scenario.confidence_note: Confidence is moderate overall; race flow matters enough that a single fixed ranking would overstate certainty.

scenario.headline: Monaco Grand Prix remains heavily qualifying-led, but the result now still evolves through laps, traffic, and pit timing.
scenario.strategy_outlook: Flexible and safety-car-aware plans gain value because the lap model can now reward neutralized stop timing directly.
scenario.event_outlook: Safety car is the strongest race-control channel, with a lap-model volatility index of 0.33.
scenario.confidence_note: Confidence is moderate overall; race flow matters enough that a single fixed ranking would overstate certainty.

calibration_hints.message: Race movement is miscalibrated relative to history. Revisit overtaking sensitivity, restart leverage, and traffic penalties.
